d: Shadewing inflicts Crimson Venom on an enemy for [[10]]s. While affected by Crimson Venom, the enemy takes damage every second equal to [[60%]]<ATK>, plus extra damage equal to [[5%]] of the enemy's lost HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases Crimson Venom's base damage per second to [[65%]]<ATK>.
Increases Crimson Venom's base damage per second to [[70%]]<ATK>.
Increases Crimson Venom's base damage per second to [[75%]]<ATK>.
Increases Crimson Venom's base damage per second to [[80%]]<ATK>.

Shadewing sinks his claw into an enemy's chest, dealing [[70%]]<ATK> damage. He then rips it free, tearing the wound open and dealing [[70%]]<ATK> damage again. The enemy continues to take [[120%]]<ATK> damage per second for the next [[5]]s.
Increases the damage of the two claw strikes to [[75%]]<ATK> and the damage dealt per second from the resulting wound to [[140%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the two claw strikes to [[80%]]<ATK> and the damage dealt per second from the resulting wound to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the two claw strikes to [[85%]]<ATK> and the damage dealt per second from the resulting wound to [[180%]]<ATK>.

When a battle starts, Shadewing soars into the enemy formation, inflicting Withering Curse on all enemies. During the flight, Shadewing is [[invincible]].
Withering Curse reduces enemies' Phys & Magic DEF by [[20%]] and converts any [[continuous damage]] they take into curse value. When the curse value reaches the lesser of [[20%]] of an enemy's max HP or [[400%]] of Shadewing's initial ATK, the curse lashes out, dealing damage equal to [[25%]] of the enemy's max HP. This damage cannot exceed [[600%]]<ATK>. The curse lashes out at most once every [[3]]s per enemy.
Increases the damage dealt when the curse lashes out to [[30%]] of the enemy's max HP. This damage cannot exceed [[700%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt when the curse lashes out to [[35%]] of the enemy's max HP. This damage cannot exceed [[800%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt when the curse lashes out to [[40%]] of the enemy's max HP. This damage cannot exceed [[900%]]<ATK>.
Increases ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[20%]] during battle.

Every time Withering Curse lashes out, Shadewing recovers [[100]] Energy and permanently increases his damage dealt by [[6%]], up to [[36%]].
When an enemy with Crimson Venom is defeated, Shadewing reclaims the venom's residual essence and recovers [[50]] Energy for each second of Crimson Venom's remaining duration.
Increases the max damage boost Shadewing can gain from Withering Curse's lash to [[42%]].
Converts [[85%]] of the damage dealt by Withering Curse's lash into true damage.
Increases the max damage boost Shadewing can gain from Withering Curse's lash to [[48%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, gains [[15]] Penetration and [[15]] Haste for [[5]]s when a battle starts and when [[assisting or defeating]] an enemy.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 15 Crit, 15 Execution, 20 Crit DMG Boost.

d: When a battle starts, Shadewing targets the ally 1 tile in front of him and drains [[10%]] of their current HP. He also gains a [[30%]] ATK boost, [[30]] Life Drain, and a shield equal to [[500%]] of the HP drained, up to [[500%]] of his ATK. The effects last until the end of the battle.
